zh.Harewood Manor, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾希亞活 曼諾
zh.Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭越可爾希亞活
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh於大約1366年出生時，她的父親Sir William Aldebrough31歲，母親Elizabeth de Lisle28歲。她於大約1384年與Sir William Ryther I在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1439年9月3日在英國越可爾希亞活 曼諾享年74歲，埋葬在英國越可爾希亞活。

zh-hans.Harewood Manor, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾希亞活 曼諾
zh-hans.Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰越可爾希亞活
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh于大约1366年出生时，她的父亲Sir William Aldebrough31岁，母亲Elizabeth de Lisle28岁。她于大约1384年与Sir William Ryther I在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1439年9月3日在英国越可爾希亞活 曼諾享年74岁，埋葬在英国越可爾希亞活。

nameMeanings.name: Sibyl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Sybil .  Even in classical times there was confusion between the two vowels in this word.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh was born about 1366, her father, Sir William Aldebrough, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth de Lisle, was 28. She married Sir William Ryther I about 1384, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 3 September 1439, in Harewood Manor, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh est née environ 1366, son père, Sir William Aldebrough, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Lisle, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Ryther I environ 1384, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1439, à Harewood Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh um 1366 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Aldebrough 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Lisle 28. Sie hat um 1384 in Yorkshire, England Sir William Ryther I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 3. September 1439 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Harewood Manor, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Harewood, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh è nata il circa 1366, sua padre, Sir William Aldebrough, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Lisle, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Ryther I circa 1384, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 3 settembre 1439, nel Harewood Manor, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Dame Sibyl Aldeburghが約1366年に生まれた時，父Sir William Aldebroughは31歳，母Elizabeth de Lisleは28歳であった。約1384年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir William Ryther Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1439年9月3日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッド マノーで74歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh(이)가 대략 1366년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Aldebrough(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Lisle(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1384년 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir William Ryther I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 9월 3일 영국 요르크실르 하레우드 먼어에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 하레우드에 묻혔다.

mn.Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kin: Harewood, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh nasceu aproximadamente 1366, seu pai, Sir William Aldebrough, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Lisle, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Ryther I aproximadamente 1384, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1439, em Harewood Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh родилась около 1366 г., её отцу по имени Sir William Aldebrough было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Lisle, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Ryther I около 1384 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 3 сентября 1439 г. в местности харюуд манор, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dame Sibyl Aldeburgh nació aproximadamente 1366, su papá, Sir William Aldebrough, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Lisle, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir William Ryther I aproximadamente 1384, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1439, en Harewood Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
